name: Maple Pralines
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugars, corn syrup, and whipping cream in a saucepan. Cook over high heat until the mixture forms a soft ball (235°F) when dropped into water.
2. Remove from heat and stir in maple flavoring and pecans.
3. Beat until creamy.
4. Drop by spoonful onto waxed paper to form bite-sized pieces.
Yield: 4 to 5 dozen.
